positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_pets_cats
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    ~cat(X0) | mammal(X0)).

cnf(u15,negated_conjecture,
    cat(sK1)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    ~mammal(sK0)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    mammal(sK1)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_pets_cats
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define pet(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define cat(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
